title: A (locally nilpotent)-by-nilpotent variety of groups
journal: Mathematical Proceedings of the Cambridge Philosophical Society
abstract:
Given positive integers k and n, let [Xfr     ] be the class of all groups G such that γk(G) 
is locally nilpotent and [x1, x2, …, xk]n = 1 for any x1, x2, …, xk ∈ G. It is shown 
that [Xfr     ] is a variety.
